questions.scenario: Troubleshooting sirasinda yeni issue olusturma akisını baslat.

steps.hint_text: Issue olusturmak icin `gh issue create` kullan.

questions.scenario: Deploy sonrasi issue 42 detayini goster.

steps.hint_text: Belirli issue icin `gh issue view <number>` kullan.

questions.scenario: Kesinti incelemesinde sana atanmis veya takip ettigin issue ozetini goster.

steps.hint_text: Issue ozet ekrani icin `gh issue status` kullan.

questions.scenario: Yeni acilan hostta pull request 15 branch'ini checkout et.

steps.hint_text: PR branch'ine gecmek icin `gh pr checkout` kullan.

questions.scenario: Runbook adiminda pull request 15 detayini goster.

steps.hint_text: Belirli PR detaylari icin `gh pr view` kullan.

questions.scenario: Operasyon kontrolunde seninle ilgili pull request durum ozetini goster.

steps.hint_text: PR ozet ekrani icin `gh pr status` kullan.

questions.scenario: Incident sonrasinda repository'deki workflow listesini goster.

steps.hint_text: Workflow listesi icin `gh workflow list` kullan.

questions.scenario: Bakim oncesi `ci` isimli workflow detayini goster.

steps.hint_text: Workflow detaylari icin `gh workflow view` kullan.

questions.scenario: Troubleshooting sirasinda gitHub Actions run listesini goster.

steps.hint_text: Actions run listesi icin `gh run list` kullan.

questions.scenario: Deploy sonrasi run 123 detayini goster.

steps.hint_text: Belirli run icin `gh run view <id>` kullan.

questions.scenario: Kesinti incelemesinde release listesini goster.

steps.hint_text: Release listesi icin `gh release list` kullan.

questions.scenario: Yeni acilan hostta gitHub gist listesini goster.

steps.hint_text: Gist listesi icin `gh gist list` kullan.

questions.scenario: Runbook adiminda `owner/repo` reposunu fork et.

steps.hint_text: Repo fork icin `gh repo fork owner/repo` kullan.

questions.scenario: Operasyon kontrolunde default GitHub repo baglamini `owner/repo` yap.

steps.hint_text: Varsayilan repo icin `gh repo set-dev-159` kullan.

questions.scenario: Incident sonrasinda gitHub'da `linux` kelimesiyle repo ara.

steps.hint_text: Repo aramasi icin `gh search repos` kullan.

questions.scenario: Bakim oncesi gitHub CLI login akisını baslat.

steps.hint_text: Auth girisi icin `gh auth login` kullan.

questions.scenario: Troubleshooting sirasinda gitHub CLI oturumunu kapat.

steps.hint_text: Logout icin `gh auth logout` kullan.

questions.scenario: Deploy sonrasi `cli/cli` reposunu GitHub CLI ile clone et.

steps.hint_text: Repo clone icin `gh repo clone owner/repo` kullan.

questions.scenario: Kesinti incelemesinde `octocat` kullanicisinin repository'lerini listele.

steps.hint_text: Bir kullanicinin repo listesi icin `gh repo list` kullan.
